_comment: Edit here to enrich timeline tooltips. Consumed by lib/render-report.jq.

605.label: Express Entry draw #605
605.desc: CRS cutoff (French-language) — verify against IRCC draw list.

667.label: Express Entry draw #667
667.desc: IRCC draw number; verify against current IRCC round list.

873.label: Express Entry draw #873
873.desc: IRCC draw number; verify against current IRCC round list.

IMM10003.label: Acknowledgement of Information (AOI)
IMM10003.desc: Internal acknowledgement; not a user-facing form.

IMM1017.label: Medical Report (IMM 1017E)
IMM1017.desc: Panel physician uses this to record your immigration medical exam. Issued by IRCC after an upfront medical request.

IMM1017B.label: Upfront Medical Report
IMM1017B.desc: Used when you book your medical before IRCC asks (Express Entry / work / study).

IMM1344.label: Application to Sponsor, Undertaking
IMM1344.desc: Sponsorship application used by the person sponsoring a family member.

IMM5406.label: Additional Family Information
IMM5406.desc: Required for permanent residence: lists immediate family members of every applicant 18+.

IMM5409.label: Statutory Declaration of Common-Law Union
IMM5409.desc: Used when common-law partners need to declare their relationship.

IMM5532.label: Relationship / Sponsorship Evaluation
IMM5532.desc: Documents relationship between sponsor and sponsored family member.

IMM5645.label: Family Information (TRV / study / work)
IMM5645.desc: Family info form for temporary residence applicants.

IMM5669.label: Schedule A – Background / Declaration
IMM5669.desc: Schedule to IMM 0008 for permanent residence.

IMM5670.label: Sponsor Undertaking (Group of Five)
IMM5670.desc: Used by community / group-of-five sponsorship applications.

IMM5756.label: Sponsor Document Checklist (spouse/partner)
IMM5756.desc: Document checklist for spouses, common-law partners, conjugal partners and dependent children.

IMM5786.label: Express Entry Profile Confirmation
IMM5786.desc: Letter confirming your EE profile is submitted and active in the pool.

IMM5787.label: Express Entry Next Steps Guide
IMM5787.desc: Guidance on what to do after creating or updating an EE profile.

IMM5791.label: Invitation to Apply (ITA)
IMM5791.desc: Official EE invitation. You have 60 days to file a complete application.

IMM5793.label: AOR – Application Receipt (EE)
IMM5793.desc: Acknowledgement of Receipt confirming IRCC got your EE PR application.

IMM5794.label: AOR – Application Receipt (EE)
IMM5794.desc: Acknowledgement of Receipt confirming IRCC got your EE PR application.

status_codes.17: Security review started (comprehensive background / criminality / security screening).
status_codes.33: Medical exam initiated OR security review completed (depending on key).
status_codes.108: Medical exam completed and results received.
